emails.school: I Am Coach Smith From Michigan State University
emails.subject: Official Scholarship Offer - Kicker - Class of 2028
emails.summary: Hi Isaac, I am Coach Smith from Michigan State University. We have been following your film closely and would like to officially offer you a full scholarship to kick for our program. We would love to
emails.body:
Hi Isaac,

I am Coach Smith from Michigan State University. We have been
following your film closely and would like to officially offer
you a full scholarship to kick for our program.

We would love to have you on campus for an official visit this
spring. Please let us know your availability.

Go Green,
Coach Smith
Michigan State Football Recruiting
